final_session_calls.command:
cd /work && python3 -c "
data = open('tests/test_basic.py').read()
data = data.replace('    chain(\n        ((x, \"True\")', '    list(chain(\n        ((x, \"True\")')
data = data.replace('        ((x, \"False\") for x in (\"0\", \"false\", \"f\", \"no\", \"n\", \"off\")),\n    ),', '        ((x, \"False\") for x in (\"0\", \"false\", \"f\", \"no\", \"n\", \"off\")),\n    )),' )
open('tests/test_basic.py','w').write(data)
"

final_session_calls.command:
cd /work && cat > /tmp/fix.py << 'EOF'
import re

with open("tests/test_basic.py", "r") as f:
    content = f.read()

# Replace chain(...) with list(chain(...))
old = '''    chain(
        ((x, "True") for x in ("1", "true", "t", "yes", "y", "on")),
        ((x, "False") for x in ("0", "false", "f", "no", "n", "off")),
    )'''

new = '''    list(
        chain(
            ((x, "True") for x in ("1", "true", "t", "yes", "y", "on")),
            ((x, "False") for x in ("0", "false", "f", "no", "n", "off")),
        )
    )'''

content = content.replace(old, new)

with open("tests/test_basic.py", "w") as f:
    f.write(content)

print("Done")
EOF
python /tmp/fix.py
final_session_calls.output: Done
